text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the Kyoto Daishoten, an unsettling
atmosphere hangs over the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
I read an article saying Satono Diamond wasn't in
the best condition... I wonder how she'll do
today...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
If even the reporters think there's something off
about her, I guess it must be pretty serious...

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I wonder what happened...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh. Yes... I'm just a little nervous...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond has been making gradual
adjustments to get her running back to its usual
form, but this will be her first true race since then.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I think I'll be fine today.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Running with Kita reminded me of something...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The feeling of just focusing on what's in front of
me as I run.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: The earnest desire I had to catch up to her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I realized that I was running for the wrong
reasons.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I felt obligated to run the way I thought an
illustrious runner would.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I thought I had to show everyone that my form
surpassed McQueen's... That it was viable
overseas...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: But I was wrong.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I want to show everyone that anything is possible.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to realize the Satono family's wish.
Wanting to surpass McQueen and the other
greats. Wanting to contribute to the world of
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Those are no different than wanting to catch up
to Kita.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: They're all my desires.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I run to achieve my own desires—not for anybody
else.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I think that misunderstanding is what caused me
to lose sight of the path I wish to tread.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I should have been focusing straight ahead and
running according to my heart's desires.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And above all, running for myself is fun.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I was finally able to remember that feeling of
enjoyment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, she's right. She
shoulders the burden of the Satono family wish
because she wants to realize it through her own
efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's running because she desires it.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The only thing in my heart as I race today will be
my dream to become an illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...I'll run in a manner befitting of me.
